N_L21B_ABS-VDC_UDS_EIPF1_20170112

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 740
Recv ID: 760
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 01
Func Name: ABS-VDC

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "16",
    "supplier": "ABCD",
    "soft": "11111111111111111111111111111111",
    "version": "11111111111111111111111111111111"
  }
]
